title: MobiusDAO - Rekt
relevance_summary: Decimal handling error in minting function allowing attacker to mint millions of tokens with minimal deposit

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls mint() with a large token amount relative to the deposit amount

red_flags: Large token mint relative to deposit
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls mint() with a large token amount relative to the deposit amount
summary: MobiusDAO suffered a $2.15 million loss due to a decimal handling error in the minting function, allowing an attacker to mint millions of tokens with a small deposit.
